  • Method Details

    • createDataStore

      public org.geotools.api.data.DataStore createDataStore(TMFeatureSource tmfs) throws IOException
      Throws:
      IOException

    • createDataStore

      public abstract org.geotools.api.data.DataStore createDataStore(TMFeatureSource tmfs, Integer timeout) throws IOException
      Create a GeoTools DataStore for the given TMFeatureSource.
      Parameters:
      tmfs - The feature source for which to create the datastore
      timeout - Optional timeout in milliseconds for datastore operations, if supported by the datastore implementation
      Returns:
      The created DataStore
      Throws:
      IOException - If an error occurs while creating the DataStore

    • openGeoToolsFeatureSource

      public org.geotools.api.data.SimpleFeatureSource openGeoToolsFeatureSource(TMFeatureType tmft, Integer timeout) throws IOException
      Throws:
      IOException

      Throws:
      IOException
